headline: Data Scientist & Technical Translator
intro_bi: End-to-end data exploration, feature engineering, and strategic dashboard architecture tailored for corporate telemetry.
intro_translation: High-precision translation, software internationalization, and cross-cultural versioning for technology enterprises.
intro_about: Discover my professional background, technical core stack, and academic trajectory operating at the intersection of data and language.

projects_bi.title: Port Logistics & Maritime Supply Chain Analysis
projects_bi.desc: Vessel flow optimization models and intelligent cargo tracking systems developed to monitor complex port operations, reduce queue bottlenecks, and stream telemetry in real time.

projects_bi.title: Natural Language Processing (NLP) Diagnostics
projects_bi.desc: Advanced linguistic algorithms, data curation pipelines, and automated text analysis diagnostics deployed to parse unstructured global data repositories.

projects_bi.title: Strategic Executive Telemetry Visualization
projects_bi.desc: Interactive Power BI architecture and advanced DAX modeling built to provide high-level corporate decision support, revenue monitoring, and KPI auditing.

projects_translation.title: Software, UI & Product Localization
projects_translation.desc: Adapting digital applications, software documentation, and interface strings for absolute regional compliance, linguistic fluency, and a native user experience (UX).

projects_translation.title: Linguistic Curation & Technical Versioning
projects_translation.desc: High-precision conversion of engineering blueprints, data science literature, scientific publications, and legal data privacy frameworks.

projects_translation.title: Terminology Management & Translation Memories
projects_translation.desc: Building structured translation memories, comprehensive enterprise databases, and domain-specific glossaries to enforce global brand consistency.

projects_about.title: Core Multi-Disciplinary Expertise
projects_about.desc: Operating gracefully where computational data engineering meets human language. Leveraging statistical models to decode hidden patterns while eliminating complex communication friction in global corporate environments.

projects_about.title: Advanced Technology Core Stack
projects_about.desc: Expert data orchestration leveraging Python, SQL databases, Git version control, tailored NLP pipelines, advanced Power BI modeling, and state-of-the-art Computer-Assisted Translation (CAT) suites.

projects_about.title: Academic Trajectory & Vision
projects_about.desc: Continuous research and development in Information Systems, Advanced Data Analytics, and Translation Technologies to design end-to-end strategic solutions for international markets.
